overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit pedestrian underpass, ascending illuminated stairs, and emerging into a bustling cyberpunk plaza surrounded by massive digital billboards and futuristic skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with digital advertising

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered underpass, passing illuminated advertisements on the left wall

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting against the graffiti-covered wall with belongings scattered nearby

entered.detail: geometric honeycomb-patterned ceiling lights running the length of the corridor
series of illuminated advertising screens displaying various products including 'EL GUAPO' and vehicle ads
concrete wall covered in spray-painted graffiti tags and text
vertical neon light strips in pink and cyan colors mounted on structural pillars

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, covered pedestrian underpass illuminated by hexagonal ceiling lights. Digital billboards line the left wall while the right wall features graffiti and neon-lit pillars. A few NPCs sit against the wall on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit staircase transition to surface level

events.description: approaching and beginning ascent of wide staircase with neon-edged steps
emerging from underpass into brighter ambient light of the open plaza above

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs toward the surface level, transitioning from enclosed to open space

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with colorful neon light strips along the edges in pink, blue, and white
metal handrails with integrated lighting running alongside the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide staircase illuminated by vibrant neon strips along the steps. The enclosed underpass gives way to an opening above, with the bright glow of the city becoming visible. The digital billboards from the underpass recede into the distance as the stairs lead upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk plaza with giant digital displays

events.description: exiting staircase into wide open plaza with massive surrounding digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward the benches and large digital displays, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying a clown-like character with 'AU' text and '15% OFF' promotion
tall vertical screen showing a purple-clad figure against a pink background
modern benches with integrated lighting surrounded by spiky plants in planters
tall concrete wall with graffiti on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a vast open plaza surrounded by towering buildings covered in massive digital billboards. A prominent AU advertisement with a clown face dominates the left side, while benches with plants occupy the center. Pedestrians walk through the space as the camera moves forward across the concrete plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban commercial district with overhead structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering buildings and overhead bridge structure

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the surrounding skyscrapers and overhead architecture, then continuing to walk while panning

entered.detail: colorful steel truss bridge or walkway spanning overhead with green, yellow, and red structural beams
skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising high above the plaza
large digital screen displaying the 'EL GUAPO' advertisement visible on the right building

segments.scene_description: The player looks up to admire the towering cyberpunk architecture, revealing a colorful steel bridge structure overhead and massive glass skyscrapers. The camera pans across the vertical cityscape, showing various holographic advertisements and illuminated building facades while continuing to move through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined, neon-lit underpass into a sprawling, vertical cyberpunk plaza. It begins by gliding through a narrow pedestrian tunnel defined by hexagonal ceiling lights, graffiti-covered walls, and digital billboards. As the camera ascends a wide staircase lined with vibrant neon strips, the enclosed space opens upward, allowing the bright glow of the city to replace the dim tunnel lighting. The scene then expands into a vast open plaza dominated by massive digital advertisements and towering skyscrapers, moving past pedestrians and greenery-topped benches. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a complex network of colorful steel bridges and holographic facades that stretch high into the illuminated cityscape.
